## Chula Vista's Top    EMERGENCY DENTIST

- State-Of-The-Art Technology
- We Accept Most PPO Insurance Plans
- Smile Transformations Made Easy
- Flexible Financing & Payments

[![](https://chulavistaurgentdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/heroimg.svg)](tel:6194266891)

![](https://chulavistaurgentdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Banner-Image-1-1024x912.png)

## The Best Emergency    Dental Services in Chula Vista

When it comes to dental emergencies, you need swift and reliable care. At Chula Vista Urgent Dental, our dentists in Chula Vista, are proud to offer emergency dental services that immediately provide our patients with the help they need. We understand dealing with a dental emergency can be difficult. Therefore, we make this process as easy and stress-free as possible for our patients so that they can get on the road to recovery quickly!

We Accept most PPO Insurance Plans and Medicare Advantage Part C Plans.

[![](https://chulavistaurgentdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/heroimg.svg)](tel:6194266891)

For Those With No Insurance.

## DENTAL EMERGENCY? Don’t Wait

If you have a severe dental emergency, such tooth pain, cracked tooth, bleeding gums, broken denture, seek urgent dental care immediately ! At Chula Vista Urgent Dental, our friendly staff will be more than happy to assist you in getting some much-needed relief from whatever troubles your oral health might be facing now!

data.summary: Chula Vista Urgent Dental provides emergency dental services with state-of-the-art technology and accommodates most PPO insurance plans, including Medicare Advantage. Their services include same-day appointments, payment plans for those without insurance, and a focus on making the process stress-free for patients. Office hours are Monday to Thursday from 8 am to 4 pm and Friday from 8 am to 12 pm. They prioritize prompt care for severe dental emergencies such as tooth pain and cracked teeth. Contact information includes their address at 549 H Street, Chula Vista, CA, and phone number +1 619-426-6891.
